candidates.name: Email Thread Sentiment Drift
candidates.pitch: Runs lightweight sentiment analysis on each Gmail message in a thread and plots a drift line. Uses a free-tier LLM API. Gap: no tool shows emotional trajectory over time within threads.
candidates.pain: Salespeople miss emotional tone shifts in long email threads and respond too late to salvage deals.

candidates.name: Pipeline Velocity Tracker
candidates.pitch: Scrapes Salesforce/HubSpot deal stage timestamps and renders a velocity chart in a sidebar. Freemium tier shows last 30 days; pro unlocks quarterly trends. Differentiator: movement speed, not just sta
candidates.pain: Sales reps manually calculate deal movement speed and miss early signals of stalled opportunities.

candidates.name: Competitor Job Posting Trend Scanner
candidates.pitch: Scrapes LinkedIn job postings for competitor company names and shows posting velocity over time. Freemium limits to 3 companies. Unique angle: hiring velocity as a sales signal.
candidates.pain: Revenue teams do not know when competitors are scaling or cutting teams, missing early market signals.

candidates.name: Meeting Transcript Action Item Splitter
candidates.pitch: Uses LLM to parse Google Meet transcripts and extract owner-assigned tasks with due dates. Freemium allows 5 extractions/month. Differentiator: action item extraction, not full summarization.
candidates.pain: Account executives lose action items in long meeting transcripts and miss follow-up commitments that close deals.

candidates.name: GCP Resource Tag Compliance Checker
candidates.pitch: Queries GCP Resource Manager API from the browser and flags untagged or mis-tagged resources per project. Per-seat B2B model targeting cloud finance teams. Differentiator: browser-native tag complianc
candidates.pain: DevOps teams accrue untagged GCP resources and face surprise billing during end-of-month reviews.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Git Branch Age Inspector
candidates.pitch: Parses git metadata from the active repo to surface branches older than a configurable threshold. Simple DOM parsing of GitHub/GitLab UI plus local git commands. Uniqueness lies in the time-decay angl
candidates.pain: Developers lose track of stale branches and waste time rebasing or reviewing outdated code.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: GitHub Star History Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Fetches star event timeline from GitHub API and renders a momentum chart. Uses public API with minimal auth. Niche: momentum over raw count, differentiating fast-rising vs legacy repos.
candidates.pain: Developers evaluate open-source projects without seeing momentum and misjudge repo health by raw star counts.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
